channel.title: Benchmark on Pi Stack
channel.description: Recent content in Benchmark on Pi Stack

item.title: Phoronix vs UnixBench vs fio: Best Self-Hosted Server Benchmark Tools 2026
item.description: When you’re running self-hosted infrastructure, knowing how your hardware performs under real workloads is critical. Whether you’re evaluating a new bare-metal server, comparing cloud VM providers, or stress-testing a home lab, having the right benchmarking tools saves you from costly deployment mistakes.
